历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (including physics category) were approximately 3467, 3544, 15657, 3626, and 5264 respectively. A significant gap occurred in 2023 (15657), quickly rebounding to 3626 in 2024, then falling back to 5264 in 2025, showing a fluctuating and declining trend in recent two years, with a baseline ranking of about 5264 in 2025; the enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Qinghai Province from 2021 to 2025 was 18, 17, 19, 18, and 18 respectively; the 2026 plan is 19, a slight increase of 1 compared to 2025, an expansion of about 5.6%, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northwest University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranked approximately 70th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 64–70 range in recent years, at the upper-middle level nationally; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation of Northwest University is slightly negative, mainly involving the plagiarism incident reported against Associate Professor Jia Qianqian from the School of Liberal Arts, for which the university has established a special task force to investigate; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 81st (average evaluation), with moderately low exposure on short video platforms; no obvious historical records of enrollment gaps. Slightly negative public opinion may mildly suppress application enthusiasm; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Geology received an A, Archaeology an A, and Software Engineering an A-, totaling three A- and above disciplines, directly mapping to enrollment majors such as Cultural Relics Protection Technology (related to Archaeology) and Computer Class (related to Software Engineering), which have some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication majors are highly recommended socially, with Law and Electrical Engineering also recommended, highly matching the university's science enrollment majors (Computer Class, Electronic Information Class, Physics Class, etc.), popular majors may attract high-scoring students; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Qinghai Province general college entrance examination is about 48,000 (slightly up from 47,669 in 2025), with physics category estimated at about 30,864 (slightly up from 30,457 in 2025), competition slightly intensifying; Northwest University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, adjacent to Qinghai Province, with convenient transportation and similar culture, having strong regional appeal for Qinghai candidates; the university's enrollment scale in Qinghai Province is relatively small (about 30 people in recent years), making ranking fluctuations relatively sensitive.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 5264, slight enrollment expansion in 2026 (18→19), a slight increase in Qinghai physics category candidates, slightly negative reputation possibly mildly suppressing enthusiasm, and popular engineering majors attracting high-scoring students, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is: predicted minimum ranking approximately 5470, with a range of 4970–5970.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (including history category) were approximately 4622, 986, 1026, 797, and 1068 respectively. The ranking was higher in 2021 (4622), then significantly moved forward to within 1000 from 2022 onwards and remained relatively stable, with a fluctuation range of about 797–1068 in the past 4 years, and a baseline ranking of about 1068 in 2025. The enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Qinghai Province from 2021 to 2025 was 12, 13, 11, 12, and 12 students respectively; the plan for 2026 is 11 students, a reduction of 1 student compared to 2025, a decrease of about 8.3%, which slightly alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northwest University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it is approximately 70th, with a stable ranking in the 64–70 range in recent years, placing it at the upper-middle level nationally. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation of Northwest University is somewhat negative, mainly involving the plagiarism accusation against Associate Professor Jia Qianqian from the School of Literature, for which the university has established a special working group to investigate. The comprehensive popularity ranking on Douyin is 81st (average evaluation), with medium to low exposure on short video platforms; no obvious history of admission cut-off gaps has been observed. The somewhat negative public opinion may slightly suppress application enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Archaeology received an A rating, Geology received an A rating, and Software Engineering received an A- rating. Among the liberal arts enrollment majors, Law (related to the A-rated Law discipline) and Chinese Language and Literature (related to the Chinese Language and Literature discipline, for which Northwest University has no separate rating) are partially associated with advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major is socially recommended, Chinese Language and Literature is recommended, Foreign Language and Literature is generally wait-and-see, and Business Administration is clearly advised against. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Qinghai Province general college entrance examination is about 48,000 (slightly increased from 47,669 in 2025), with an estimated 17,136 in the history category (slightly decreased from 17,212 in 2025), leading to a slight easing of competition. Northwest University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, adjacent to Qinghai Province, with convenient transportation and similar culture, exerting a strong regional attraction for Qinghai candidates. The university's enrollment scale in Qinghai Province is relatively small (about 30 people in recent years), making it a small-scale enrollment, and ranking fluctuations are relatively sensitive.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1068, the slight enrollment reduction in 2026 (12→11), the slight decrease in history category candidates in Qinghai, the somewhat negative reputation that may slightly suppress enthusiasm, and the continued appeal of popular liberal arts majors such as Law, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 995, with a range of 815–1175.
